The following events took place in '''490 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*The [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] is established, encompassing dozens of unexplored [[Planet/Legends|worlds]]<ref name="TEGASx" /> in several hundred [[Star system/Legends|star systems]], none of them reported to contain [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] life.<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>
*The [[Arkanian/Legends|Arkanians]] increase the intelligence of the simple-minded [[Yaka]] by performing [[Brain/Legends|brain]]-enhancement surgery on them.<ref name="TEGASx" />
